meanings.definition: a digestible substance used to give color to food
examples: food color made from vegetable dyes

meanings.definition: a visual attribute of things that results from the light they emit or transmit or reflect
examples: a white color is made up of many different wavelengths of light

meanings.definition: the act or process of changing the color of something
affect as in thought or feeling
examples: My personal feelings color my judgment in this case
His political ideas color his lectures
color the walls with paint in warm tones

meanings.definition: give a deceptive explanation or excuse for
change color, often in an undesired manner
